team.pageSubtitle: Create teams, add members, assign repositories and control roles in one place.

billing.pageSubtitle: Manage trial/active/past-due/canceled states, feature entitlements, and plan transitions with explicit outcomes.

billing.confirmDowngrade: Confirm downgrade to a lower plan?
billing.invoiceMarkedAsPaid: Invoice marked as paid and premium features unlocked.

jobs.pageSubtitle: Track review, scan and analytics jobs with ETA, retries, paused/stuck states, operator recovery actions and audit history.

privacyRedaction.pageSubtitle: Detect and redact secrets/PII before copy, export or share operations.
